message:
🐛 Persist EPG timeshift, fix info panel layout and programme lookup (#47)

- Save/restore per-channel EPG timeshifts via SharedPreferences
- Fix _getEpgProgramme to account for timeshift when finding current programme
- Fix _getNextProgramme to find programme after shifted current
- Move provider badge and current time to top-right of info panel
- Add episode info (parsed from XMLTV) with clickable IMDB link
- Cap description to 1 line to prevent overflow
- Pass timeshiftHours to all _programmeTimeRange calls
- Use windowed query in _refreshNowPlaying for shifted channels

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
